negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_962e6081-fb20-412a-ba57-e5dd93d9dd03
prompt: The video showcases two rugged, off-road vehicles parked side by side in a stunning mountainous landscape. Both cars are dark green, covered in mud, and equipped with large tires. The first vehicle has black rims with a metallic border, while the second car's rims are entirely metallic. A large orange object with a textured surface and cut corners is attached to the right side of the covered cargo compartment of the first vehicle. The roof of the first car is fitted with a flat, elongated rectangular black object that spans the entire roof from the rear to the middle of the cabin.  The camera moves in a curved path to the right, capturing a wide shot from an eye-level angle, highlighting the stationary vehicles on a grassy plateau. As the camera pans, the silhouette of a man in the front seat of the first car becomes visible. Initially, his head is down, but he raises it as the camera continues to move. The front part of the second car is partially obscured by the first car. The cargo area of the second car, open on the sides, is loaded with items in black and orange. On the roof of the cargo area, another flat, elongated rectangular black object covers the entire roof above the compartment, with a small horizontal white line running down the middle.  In the background, a majestic mountain range adorned with snow-capped peaks and jagged, rocky slopes stretches wide, creating a striking contrast with the lower forests visible in the lower right corner of the frame. Puffy white clouds float above the mountains, and sunlight casts sharp shadows, enhancing the rugged textures of the vehicles and the surrounding environment.
